title: Provi's Origins
description: Adds 9 unique origins with fresh concepts and many new power types.
body:
# Provi's Origins ![Image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/17149901/266799270-51e66ef2-0459-4c36-be7e-6af2abc49465.png)
## Summary A decently sized addon mod for [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins). Provi's Origins adds a collection of new origins, new power types, new action types, and conditions to enhance the game. All of the additional Apoli content (power types, action types, etc) are designed to be easily reused in other addons or datapacks. Check the [wiki](https://github.com/Provismet/Provi-Origins/wiki) for documentation or more information. ## New Origins
Lily of the Void
Kraken of Decay
Drakling
Jelly Sculk
Splinter
Faerie Moth
Alraune
Homunculus
Crystalliser
## Power Expansion Provi's Origins adds many new power types, action types, and condition types to Apoli (the data-driven power system of Origins). Many of these are otherwise impossible (or in some cases inconvenient) to create using just Origins itself. Every addition made to Apoli has been designed with reusability in mind instead of being tied to the themes of this mod. Datapack creators can easily use them for their own original ideas. The mod's [wiki](https://github.com/Provismet/Provi-Origins/wiki) is even styled after the Origin's documentation for ease of use. ## Extras For the full experience, it's recommended to also use: - [Extra Damage Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-damage-enchantments) - [ExtraDE Origins Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/extrade-origins-addon) - [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) The additional lantern items are compatible with [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights). ## Modpacks Feel free to add this mod to any modpack. For help on how you can adjust the tags to better integrate this mod, check the wiki on [Modpack Guidance](https://github.com/Provismet/Provi-Origins/wiki/Modpack-Guidance). ## Showcase and Summary Video
